# EuroSpa

> EuroSpa is a licensed European massage centre in Barsha Heights, Dubai. It offers Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, aroma and bamboo fusion massage by expert European therapists, open every day from 10:00 to 02:00. Booking is handled through WhatsApp; there is no online payment.

## Links

- [EuroSpa website](https://promo.eurospa.ae/): home page with services, therapists, gallery and booking
- [Book on WhatsApp](https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=971562279600): direct booking chat, +971 56 227 9600
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/eurospa.dxb/): photos and reels
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/eurospa.dubai/): page and reviews
- [Location on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/FjuX6k68DiMQL5xL7): Ramada by Wyndham Hotel, 2nd floor, Barsha Heights, Dubai

## Details

- Address: Ramada by Wyndham Hotel, 2nd floor, Barsha Heights (Tecom), Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Hours: every day, 10:00 to 02:00
- Phone: +971 50 227 1889
- Email: dubaimassagetreat@gmail.com
- Price range: AED 300 to 1320, inclusive of 15% service charge, 7% municipality fee and 5% VAT
- Cancellation: 24 hours notice required for changes or cancellations
- Therapists: Alexia, Dana, Elena, Mila, Kate, Marina, Alex

## Services (price for 60 min / 90 min, in AED)

- [Tension Relaxation Massage (Swedish)](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 450 / 650
- [Deep Muscle Relaxation Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 500 / 700
- [Essential Oil Aroma Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 300 / 520
- [Thai Tranquility Therapy (Lomi Lomi)](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 570 / 850
- [Hot Stone Enjoyment Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 570 / 850
- [Double Relaxation Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 940 / 1320
- [Indulgences for Two](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 940 / 1320
- [Signature Bamboo Fusion Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 570 / 850
- [Traditional Thai Stretching Massage](https://promo.eurospa.ae/#treatments): 570 / 850
